core.title: loan
core.description: debt instrument whereby one party extends money or credit to another party (or parties) with the understanding that the borrowed money will be repaid according to the terms of the contract

core.title: secured loan
core.description: loan in which the borrower pledges some asset via a security agreement as collateral for the loan, or that is secured via third-party guarantee

core.title: collateralized loan
core.description: secured loan that is secured with cash or other acceptable collateral (real property, securities or other assets) provided by the borrower as specified in the collateral agreement

core.title: loan secured by real estate
core.description: loan that, at origination, is secured wholly or substantially by a lien or liens on real property for which the lien or liens are central to the extension of the credit - that is, the borrower would not have been extended credit in the same amount or on terms as favorable without the lien or liens on real property

core.title: mortgage
core.description: grant of financial interest in real property to a party that is not an owner of that real property and is recorded by a registration authority

core.title: closed-end mortgage loan
core.description: loan secured by real estate with no ability for the borrower to receive additional funds under the loan at a later date

core.title: open-end mortgage loan
core.description: loan secured by real estate with a provision that the outstanding loan amount may be increased upon mutual agreement of the lender and the borrower

core.title: reverse mortgage loan
core.description: loan secured by real estate that pays money to the borrower against a set principal limit based on the value of existing equity in the underlying collateral

core.title: home equity line of credit
core.description: line of credit granted to a homeowner secured by the equity value in a borrower's home or other property

core.title: loan product
core.description: financial product that is realized as a loan that a party may acquire from a lending institution with specific characteristics and terms

core.title: loan offering
core.description: offering related to a loan product that may be a tailored to particular circumstances, aimed at a group of borrowers or individual borrower

core.title: loan application
core.description: request by a potential borrower to a potential lender to borrow money containing information used to decide whether to grant the loan

core.title: pre-approval request
core.description: request from a potential borrower that a lender commit to pre-approving the borrower for a loan of up to a specified amount of money

core.title: pre-approval contract
core.description: written commitment to lend when specified conditions are met, such as finding suitable property, and unchanged creditworthiness

core.title: underwriting decision
core.description: classifier providing a loan approval recommendation determined either manually or by an automated underwriting system

core.title: automated underwriting system
core.description: software system that collects the information necessary to approve a loan application and supports a mortgage lender's analysis of a new loan application

core.title: credit risk assessment
core.description: risk assessment that focuses on determining the likelihood of a potential borrower repaying a loan

core.title: borrower assessment
core.description: assessment report detailing information about the borrower and their credit history that may be relevant to the loan application

core.title: collateral valuation
core.description: assessment activity resulting in the valuation of real property as collateral

core.title: income verification report
core.description: report providing the methodology and supporting documentation used to verify the borrower's income

core.title: individual person credit rating
core.description: credit rating that provides an opinion of the creditworthiness of a person

core.title: payment history
core.description: record of actual payments of principal, interest, and other related amounts made by a borrower to a lender or servicer in order to fulfill their re-payment obligation

core.title: loan-to-value ratio
core.description: ratio, expressed as a percentage, between the principal amount of the loan and the appraised value of the asset securing the financing

core.title: combined loan-to-value ratio
core.description: ratio of the total amount of debt that is secured by the asset(s) and the appraised value of the asset(s) securing the financing

core.title: total debt expense ratio
core.description: ratio of all monthly debt payments of all borrowers, including proposed expenses, with respect to the income of the borrowers as relied upon to make a credit decision

core.title: total outstanding principal
core.description: the principal balance of all loans secured by the property

core.title: borrower monthly income
core.description: total monthly qualifying income of a potential borrower

core.title: amortization type
core.description: classifier of amortization algorithms

core.title: loan payment schedule
core.description: regular or explicit (ad hoc) payment schedule associated with a given loan-specific account

core.title: pre-payment terms
core.description: principal repayment terms related to payment of the loan prior to maturity

core.title: good faith estimate
core.description: GFE - representation by the lender on the costs and implications of settlement (early termination) of the loan.

core.title: monetary amount
core.description: measure that is an amount of money specified in monetary units

core.title: income
core.description: revenue received during a period of time

core.title: borrower
core.description: party to a credit agreement that is obligated to repay the amount borrowed (principal) with interest and other fees according to the terms of the instrument

core.title: lender
core.description: a party that extends credit or money to a borrower with the expectation of being repaid, usually with interest

core.title: creditor
core.description: a party to whom an obligation, such as an amount of money, or good, or performance of some service exists

core.title: financial institution
core.description: financial service provider identified as either a government agency or privately owned entity that collects funds from the public and from other institutions, and invests those funds in financial assets, such as loans, securities, bank deposits, and income-generating property

core.title: guarantor
core.description: party that guarantees, endorses, or provides indemnity for some obligation on behalf of some other party

core.title: servicer
core.description: party that collects principal and interest payments on behalf of the lender

core.title: mortgage indemnity guarantor
core.description: guarantor and insurer that provides mortgage insurance in the form of a mortgage indemnity guarantee (MIG)

core.title: co-maker
core.description: party that signs a borrower's promissory note, providing additional security and potentially improving the quality of the debt

core.title: collateral
core.description: something pledged as security to ensure fulfillment of an obligation to another party, to lend money, extend credit, or provision securities

core.title: real property
core.description: physical asset defined as land together with any structures that are permanently attached to that land, such as houses, trees, fences and improvements

core.title: appraisal
core.description: written estimate of the market value of something as of some point in time, typically provided by a qualified appraiser

core.title: appraised value
core.description: estimated value of some asset as of a given point in time

core.title: lender lien position
core.description: classifier indicating whether the lender has the primary lien position with respect to an asset used as collateral for the loan

core.title: ownership interest
core.description: classifier indicating the nature of the applicant's or borrower's ownership or leasehold interest in an asset used as collateral for the loan

core.title: property usage
core.description: a category indicating the manner in which the borrower intends to utilize the property

core.title: credit agreement
core.description: contractual agreement in which a debtor receives something of value and typically agrees to repay the creditor by some date in the future, in some form (e.g., cash, securities, etc.), generally with interest

core.title: principal
core.description: with respect to a debt: the value of an obligation, such as a bond or loan, raised and that must be repaid at maturity; for investments: the original amount of money invested, separate from any associated interest, dividends or capital gains

core.title: loan or credit account
core.description: account associated with a service in which the account holder receives funds from the account provider under certain terms and conditions for repayment

core.title: legal obligation
core.description: an obligation or duty that is enforceable by a court

core.title: disclosure provision
core.description: contractual provision that outlines the requirements and responsibilities of one or both parties to reveal certain information to each other

core.title: use of proceeds provision
core.description: contract provision specifying how funds obtained through financing, such as through a credit agreement, offering, warrant, or other instrument are intended to be used

core.title: payment
core.description: delivery of money in fulfillment of an obligation, such as to satisfy a claim or debt

core.title: loan purpose
core.description: A selection of different types of loan purpose, being the purpose for which and manner in which loan (credit) draw-down amounts are to be used. This shows the purpose for which credit is to be used, and implies certain kinds of fact that relate to that specific type of loan e.g. mortgages. These are also identified as tranche types in tranches of a credit facility.

core.title: mortgage loan purpose
core.description: the purpose for which mortgage loan proceeds will be used, such as real property purchase, dwelling construction, or loan refinancing

core.title: HMDA covered loan contract
core.description: a closed-end mortgage loan or open-end line of credit that is not an excluded transaction for HMDA reporting under US section 1003.3(c) of the Revised Home Mortgage Disclosure Act of 2015

core.title: HMDA report
core.description: a report prepared to satisfy HMDA regulatory reporting requirements as described US section 1003.3(c) of the Revised Home Mortgage Disclosure Act of 2015

core.title: reg b
core.description: US regulation concerning "Equal credit opportunity act" Electronic delivery of disclosures

core.title: reg z
core.description: US Fed regulation "Truth in Lending Act" uniform standards for electronic delivery of disclosures

core.title: loan regulatory requirement
core.description: A regulatory requirement defined in regulations by a comsumer credit act or other legislation.

core.title: universal loan identifier
core.description: unique identifier given to unequivocally identify a specific loan secured by real estate

core.title: Nationwide Mortgage Licensing System and Registry Identifier
core.description: the number permanently assigned by the Nationwide Mortgage Licensing System and Registry (NMLS) for each company, branch, and individual that maintains a single account on NMLS.
